就跳了几个。超级推荐第二个大如传，红姑和弘历真的很爱。还有九百多章的女穿男之我是四阿哥，人间魅魔四阿哥。不止大半阿哥支持他，连太子的岳家和大阿哥的明珠都偷偷支持他。后面直接掀翻康熙，上位了。上位那一部分很搞笑哈哈哈哈哈。推荐推荐","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":28,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774123867520D0E1A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227505783928494785342%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410773304170007577%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747579103,"group_id":"7410773304170007577","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"静待富贵花开哈哈哈哈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5kpGSwdSbpOcGTdecSy+FggGaIagv3vBM324PVDmRrB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/21530abc29f34259911e6d3179832eaf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701034&x-signature=qkMnVvTUgDzyA2oR%2BINT1nL%2FJxc%3D","user_id":"1766257442686490","user_name":"乌云充电宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1766257442686490","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7410773304170007577","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越+金手指（不大）+宫斗宅斗+生子

女主头脑清醒，知道自己要什么，而且对一些有威胁的人都是从一开始就把她们按下去，比如海兰和魏嬿婉，直接不给出场机会，这点非常舒适。

_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18680,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":41991,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11304},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609341028659921689","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看有意思的文，作者文笔不错。很多地方很好笑，主角识时务，不受委屈，大智若愚，演技绝对顶
主角金手指虽然不算大，但真的挺好的，记忆力不错，身体健壮自带美颜都很好，毕竟身体是本钱嘛，但是隔三年一生的设定个人不大喜欢🤣还是希望自由点，就不能想生就能生嘛想不生就生不了嘛
最近有点腻歪如懿传，所以我是跳着看的，目前看了欢乐颂安陵容颂芝浣碧明玉，主角每到甄嬛传世界都提醒橘关于十三弟的事，挺有意思，虽然是跳着看的，但是夏冬春安陵容颂芝浣碧这几个世界是连着的，有点同情主角，一连四个世界都得面对胖橘，吃的都不咋好
浣碧世界尤其有意思，主角故意让甄嬛觉得胖橘有不能说的癖好欺负了主角，甄嬛直接少女心恋爱脑破碎，战斗力爆棚，觉得主角受委屈柔弱不能自理，为主角冲锋陷阵，而主角也给胖橘上眼药，让胖橘觉得甄嬛利欲熏心，主角就在两人的庇佑下躺平","text_exts":[{"e":144,"s":141,"text":"如懿传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774123867520D0E1A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609341028659921689%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410773304170007577%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A6%82%E6%87%BF%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":161,"s":158,"text":"欢乐颂","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%AC%A2%E4%B9%90%E9%A2%82&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774123867520D0E1A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609341028659921689%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410773304170007577%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%AC%A2%E4%B9%90%E9%A2%82%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":164,"s":161,"text":"安陵容","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AE%89%E9%99%B5%E5%AE%B9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774123867520D0E1A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609341028659921689%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410773304170007577%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AE%89%E9%99%B5%E5%AE%B9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":178,"s":175,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%
